title: Little Miss Smiles
writer: Myra Kelly, John Stone, Dorothy Yost
actors: Shirley Mason, Gaston Glass, George B. Williams
plot: The Jewish Aaronson family lives in humble quarters in the ghetto of a large city. Esther spreads sunshine with her smiles, and when Mama is stricken blind and taken to the hospital, she assumes the duties as head of the family.
